MaturityLevel.description:
The four maturity levels (Methodology §3.1).

The numeric ``index`` is for computation only; clients see the label. These four indices
are the ONLY legal subcomponent indices — any other value is a contract violation, not a
datum to clamp or round (ADR-0001 §1).
MaturityLevel.title: MaturityLevel

WizardSuggestionKind.description:
GUIDANCE points at a field to reconsider (no value); PREFILL proposes a concrete starting
value the advisor accepts or edits.
WizardSuggestionKind.title: WizardSuggestionKind

description:
One AI-proposed suggestion on a wizard input step. `id` is a stable key (so the UI can
dismiss or de-dupe it). A PREFILL carries `proposed_level` for the (module_key,
subcomponent_key) it targets; a GUIDANCE carries only the pointer + rationale.
title: WizardSuggestion
